name: Under the Sea dot artwork
description:
A hand-drawn mixed media artwork titled 'Under the Sea' created in March 2011, featuring vibrant multicolored pen lines depicting abstract organic forms, wavy patterns, and circular motifs with a biological or underwater aesthetic.

Here is how it was made!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IwKJ9Ix8Zx8

The permalink for this page is https://art.robnugen.com/uts11
